title: Vasarian brandy
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Food |image=[[File:VasarianBrandy.png]] |name=Vasarian brandy |origin=[[Talus/Legends|Talus]] |date= |race= |creator= |found= |type= |description= |animals= |plants= |other= |edible=*[[Feeorin/Legends|Feeorins]] *[[Human/Legends|Humans]] |inedible= |potable= |nutrition= |effects= |dishes= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|While the bottles say Corellian Reserve, what they're pouring is Vasarian."
"I like Vasarian.|[[Usk Haffa]] and [[Dix Tarfait]], aboard the ''[[Salin Mariner]]''|{{InsiderCite|144|Hondo Ohnaka's Not-So-Big Score}}}} '''Vasarian brandy''' was an [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] [[Brandy/Legends|brandy]] made from fruits and berries from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Talus/Legends|Talus]]. It was popular on [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] worlds such as [[Lok/Legends|Lok]]. The [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Nym/Legends|Nym]] enjoyed drinking from large mugs of [[Vasar system/Legends|Vasarian]] brandy while entertaining potential business associates. [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]] was also fond of it. ==Appearances== *{{InsiderCite|144|Hondo Ohnaka's Not-So-Big Score|reprint=1}} *''[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Ruins of Dantooine]]'' *{{GalaxiesAED}} *''[[Assault at Selonia]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Total Experience: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars Galaxies: The Total Experience'': Prima Official Game Guide]] *{{SonyCite|url=content.jsp?page=Friday%20Feature:%20The%20Secrets%20of%20Good%20Eating|text=Friday Feature: The Secrets of Good Eating}} *[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Complete Guide: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars Galaxies: The Complete Guide'': Prima Official Game Guide]] *''[[Suns of Fortune]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{SWGWiki|Vasarian Brandy}} [[Category:Brandies]]
